TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Alexander_De_Croo, title = Alexander_De_Croo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Alexander_De_Croo} }

S.FORM: Alexander De Croo ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 11, Alexander De Croo, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1975) mrhuw Belgium ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander De Croo, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Alexander De Croo minkahul sa Vilvoorde, Flemish Brabant na Belgium. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1975 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' == canpyuta hknyun ==

Alexander De Croo ryax sa tay 3 nqu tay 11, Alexander De Croo, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1975) mrhuw Belgium ta' misuw hya' ga Alexander De Croo, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 10 sa kawas 2020 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Alexander De Croo minkahul sa Vilvoorde, Flemish Brabant na Belgium. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1975 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' == canpyuta hknyun ==
S.PHON: alexan*er *e ʦ~ʨroo rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, alexan*er *e ʦ~ʨroo, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βelɣium taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa alexan*er *e ʦ~ʨroo, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj ** s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral alexan*er *e ʦ~ʨroo minkaħul s~ɕa *il*oor*e, *lemis~ɕħ βraβant na βelɣium. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ == ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun ==
